{"file_path":"/home/runner/work/A-Guy/A-Guy/src/lib/latex-parser/split-exercises.ts","content":"/**
 * @fileType utility
 * @domain latex-parser
 * @pattern solution-routing
 * @ai-summary Split a LaTeX document into individual exercise chunks, attaching solutions to their matching exercises.
 */

/**
 * Result of splitting a LaTeX document into exercise chunks.
 *
 * Solution routing contract: solutions are stored inside the exercise chunk's
 * `solution` field when the LaTeX uses separate `\section*{פתרונות}` blocks.
 * The AI import prompt (`PDF_TO_EXERCISE`) expects solutions to be embedded
 * in the question block's `solution`/`fullSolution` fields, NOT as separate
 * LaTeX blocks after the question.
 *
 * Combined LaTeX block format (used between create-context-exercises and AI import):
 * ```
 * \textbf{תרגיל N}
 * ...exercise content...
 * \section*{פתרון}
 * ...solution content...
 * ```
 * Both the exercise and its solution are in ONE LaTeX block so … [+3727 chars]
